requirement_topic.en: Authorized Importer (Yetkili İthalatçı) and Turkish-Language Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 授权进口商（Yetkili İthalatçı）及土耳其语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 授權進口商（Yetkili İthalatçı）及土耳其語標注

summary.en: Turkish consumer protection law and product safety regulations require that all imported electronic devices have a designated authorized importer (yetkili ithalatçı) established in Turkey. The authorized importer's name, trade name, and Turkish address must appear on the product label and in the user manual in Turkish. The BTK type approval certificate number must also be displayed on the product label in Turkish. All mandatory safety and regulatory information — including compliance marks, voltage and frequency ratings, intended use warnings, and disposal information — must be provided in Turkish. Failure to appoint an authorized importer or to provide Turkish-language labelling may result in customs clearance refusal, product withdrawal, or administrative fines under the Consumer Protection Law No. 6502 and the Regulation on Technical Regulations and Standardisation for Foreign Trade.
summary.zh: 土耳其消费者保护法及产品安全法规要求所有进口电子设备须在土耳其指定一名授权进口商（yetkili ithalatçı）。授权进口商的名称、商号及土耳其地址须以土耳其语显示于产品标签及用户手册上。BTK型式批准证书编号亦须以土耳其语显示于产品标签上。所有强制性安全及监管信息——包括合规标志、额定电压及频率、预期用途警告及弃置信息——均须以土耳其语提供。未指定授权进口商或未提供土耳其语标注，可能依据第6502号《消费者保护法》及《对外贸易技术法规与标准化条例》导致海关清关被拒、产品撤回或行政罚款。
summary.zht: 土耳其消費者保護法及產品安全法規要求所有進口電子設備須在土耳其指定一名授權進口商（yetkili ithalatçı）。授權進口商的名稱、商號及土耳其地址須以土耳其語顯示於產品標籤及用戶手冊上。BTK型式批准證書編號亦須以土耳其語顯示於產品標籤上。所有強制性安全及監管資訊——包括合規標誌、額定電壓及頻率、預期用途警告及棄置資訊——均須以土耳其語提供。未指定授權進口商或未提供土耳其語標注，可能依據第6502號《消費者保護法》及《對外貿易技術法規與標準化條例》導致海關清關被拒、產品撤回或行政罰款。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Protection Law No. 6502 (Tüketicinin Korunması Hakkında Kanun)
Regulation on Technical Regulations and Standardisation for Foreign Trade
BTK Type Approval labelling requirements (BTK certificate number on label)

summary.en: China does not require a designated authorized importer in the same sense for domestically manufactured goods. For imported products, a domestic distributor or agent is common practice but is not a formal statutory designation analogous to the Turkish yetkili ithalatçı system. Chinese product labelling must be in Mandarin Chinese under GB standards and the Product Quality Law, but this is a domestic-market requirement and does not fulfil Turkey's Turkish-language labelling obligation. There is no direct Chinese equivalent for the Turkish authorized importer requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对国内生产商品不以同等形式要求指定授权进口商。对于进口产品，国内经销商或代理商是惯例做法，但并非类似土耳其yetkili ithalatçı制度的正式法定指定。依据GB标准及《产品质量法》，中国产品标注须使用普通话，但这是国内市场要求，不满足土耳其的土耳其语标注义务。土耳其授权进口商要求在中国无直接对应制度。
summary.zht: 中國對國內生產商品不以同等形式要求指定授權進口商。對於進口產品，國內經銷商或代理商是慣例做法，但並非類似土耳其yetkili ithalatçı制度的正式法定指定。依據GB標準及《產品質量法》，中國產品標注須使用普通話，但這是國內市場要求，不滿足土耳其的土耳其語標注義務。土耳其授權進口商要求在中國無直接對應制度。

standards_or_laws: Product Quality Law of the People's Republic of China
GB labelling requirements (Mandarin Chinese labelling for domestic market)

gap.en: Full gap. Turkish law requires a formal authorized importer (yetkili ithalatçı) established in Turkey with their details on the label and in the manual in Turkish. Chinese domestic labelling in Mandarin does not satisfy this requirement. A Turkish entity (importer, distributor, or local representative) must be contracted and their Turkish-language contact details added to all product labels and documentation.
gap.zh: 完全差距。土耳其法律要求在土耳其设立正式授权进口商（yetkili ithalatçı），其信息须以土耳其语显示于标签和说明书上。中文普通话标注不满足此要求。须签约一个土耳其实体（进口商、经销商或当地代表），并将其土耳其语联系信息添加至所有产品标签和文件。
gap.zht: 完全差距。土耳其法律要求在土耳其設立正式授權進口商（yetkili ithalatçı），其資訊須以土耳其語顯示於標籤和說明書上。中文普通話標注不滿足此要求。須簽約一個土耳其實體（進口商、經銷商或當地代表），並將其土耳其語聯繫資訊添加至所有產品標籤和文件。

source.publisher: T.C. Resmî Gazete (Official Gazette of Turkey)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is no Chinese equivalent for Turkey's authorized importer requirement. A Turkish-established entity must be designated as yetkili ithalatçı with their name and address appearing in Turkish on all product labels and user documentation. BTK certificate number must also appear on the label in Turkish.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 土耳其授权进口商要求在中国无对应制度。须指定一个在土耳其设立的实体作为yetkili ithalatçı，其名称和地址须以土耳其语显示在所有产品标签和用户文件上。BTK证书编号亦须以土耳其语显示在标签上。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 土耳其授權進口商要求在中國無對應制度。須指定一個在土耳其設立的實體作為yetkili ithalatçı，其名稱和地址須以土耳其語顯示在所有產品標籤和用戶文件上。BTK證書編號亦須以土耳其語顯示在標籤上。
